# HODA Wellness Group
> Integrated wellness practice combining functional medicine, nutrition, and movement coaching for durable aging in Allen, TX.

## About
HODA Wellness Group offers personalized, evidence-informed programs that integrate metabolic health, nutrition, physical resilience, and nervous system regulation. We help clients live stronger, longer, and better at every stage of life.

## Team
- Olga Rubanov — Founder, Functional Medicine & Polyvagal Theory
- Anna Rabinovich, DNP, APRN — Nurse Practitioner, Endocrinology & Diabetes
- Eugenia Kobylatsky, M.Sc. — Registered Dietitian, Disease Prevention & Nutrition
- Jack Johnston — Personal Trainer, Longevity & Movement Optimization

## Programs
- [6-Week Optimization Program](/programs/6-week-optimization) — Intensive reset with labs, coaching, and CGM
- [VIP Coaching](/programs/vip-coaching) — Ongoing high-touch coaching and accountability
- [Workshops & Seminars](/programs/workshops-seminars) — Expert-led group sessions on wellness topics
- [Corporate Wellness](/programs/corporate-wellness) — Custom programs for organizations

## Blog
- [HODA Wellness Blog](/blog) — Articles on functional medicine, metabolic health, and healthy living
